note: Reset 2026-07-19. The previous entry recorded a ping that never left the machine - ping_claude.ps1 died on a cp1252 parse error before executing a single line - and the old code stamped this file before reading the exit code, so a send that never happened locked her out for 10 minutes. Only exit 0 (DELIVERED) writes here now. ts:0 means no delivered ping on record.
